Tuple Technologies Develops AI-powered Infrastructure at 2026 DACby Daniel Nenni on 07-20-2026 at 6:00 am

View Profile

View Forum Posts

View Articles

Private Message

Categories: Events, Semiconductor Services, Tuple Technologies

Key takeaways ▼

Tuple Technologies develops AI-powered infrastructure and operations platforms specifically designed for semiconductor companies. The company’s solutions help engineering organizations simplify CAD infrastructure management, optimize cloud resources, improve security and compliance, and reduce operational costs through intelligent automation and analytics.
At DAC 2026, Tuple will showcase its flagship products:
• Stratos™ Platform — a unified semiconductor operations platform combining AI agents, cloud compute management, security, monitoring, and license management.
• Nitro™ License Monitor — an AI-powered EDA license analytics platform that provides real-time utilization visibility and renewal intelligence across FlexLM, RLM, and custom license servers.
• Cloud, IT, and CAD Services — expert services for CAD infrastructure deployment and management, cloud migration and optimization, DevSecOps, managed IT operations, security and compliance, and hybrid cloud environments tailored for IC design workflows.
Target Applications
ASIC and SoC development, Design Verification environments, Physical Design and Signoff flows, multi-site and hybrid cloud compute environments, enterprise CAD infrastructure operations, EDA license management and optimization, and security and compliance for design environments.
Challenges Being Addressed
Setting up the right IT infrastructure is a bottleneck for chip design companies. The need is for a flexible Cloud, On-prem or Hybrid and a vendor-agnostic platform -> Stratos Platform .
License analytics without Job queue integration is fragmented. Limited visibility into EDA license utilization, renewal negotiations without usage data and fragmented operational tools without Job queue metrics and multi-cloud compute management complexity is a challenge -> Nitro.
Target Audience
VP Engineering, CAD Managers, CAD Engineers, IT Infrastructure Managers, Engineering Directors, ASIC Engineering Leaders, CIOs, CTOs, and Cloud Infrastructure Architects.
DAC Demo Highlight
See AI in Action at Booth #1569:
• Stratos platform to Build, Run and Scale a vendor-agnostic IT & CAD infrastructure

Identify underutilized EDA licenses and reduce software spend.
• Analyze license denials and forecast future demand.
• Optimize cloud and on-prem compute resources.
• Ask operational questions in plain English instead of searching dashboards and reports.

Booth Information
Visit Tuple Technologies at Booth #1569 during DAC 2026.
Meeting Request URL:
https://www.tupletechnologies.net/contact/
